properties.sql: SELECT sup.c_supplier_code AS supplier_code, COALESCE(sup.c_supplier_name, sup.c_supplier_code) AS supplier_name, COUNT(DISTINCT stx.id) AS total_receipts, COUNT(DISTINCT NULLIF(stx.c_supplier_invoice_no, '')) AS distinct_invoices, COUNT(DISTINCT stl.c_input_code) AS distinct_inputs, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(NULLIF(stl.c_quantity, '') AS NUMERIC(15,2))), 0) AS total_qty_received, to_char(COALESCE(SUM(CAST(NULLIF(stl.c_quantity, '') AS NUMERIC(15,2)) * COALESCE(CAST(NULLIF(stl.c_unit_price, '') AS NUMERIC(15,2)), 0)), 0), 'FM999,999,999.00') AS total_value_disp, MAX(stx.c_txn_date) AS last_delivery FROM app_fd_im_supplier sup LEFT JOIN app_fd_im_stock_txn stx ON stx.c_supplier_code = sup.c_supplier_code AND stx.c_txn_type = 'RECEIPT' LEFT JOIN app_fd_im_stock_txn_line stl ON stl.c_txn_id = stx.id GROUP BY sup.c_supplier_code, sup.c_supplier_name ORDER BY total_receipts DESC NULLS LAST, supplier_name
